review_notes: The functions proposed are relevant to the management of ServiceAccounts in Kubernetes, aligning with the FedRAMP AC-2 (1) control for automated account management. The naming convention mostly follows the pattern, but minor improvements could enhance clarity and consistency.
naming_improvements: Consider using 'k8s_rbac_service_account_unused_cleanup' for better clarity and consistency with the naming pattern.
title: Account Management | Automated System Account Management
step1_reasoning: The FedRAMP control AC-2 (1) focuses on automated management of system accounts, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to the management of ServiceAccounts. Ensuring that unused ServiceAccounts are cleaned up, tokens are rotated, and activity is logged aligns with the intent of automating account management to enhance security.
